name: [YAOC2] Capability Guard — Communications
_doc: Pre-flight guard for all outbound communications and LLM capabilities. CHECKS registry covers: telegram, whatsapp, google_ai, gmail, google_calendar, openai-compat, deepseek, anthropic_direct, slack. Returns {status:'ok'} or {status:'missing', missingFields:[], instructions:'', onboarding_workflow:''}. Add new capabilities to the CHECKS object only — never modify the guard logic below it.
